goals: Find files related to vintage cinema or film projectors in the workspace
Read the contents of relevant files to learn more about the available resources
Create a new file to organize notes about film projector maintenance

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic about vintage cinema and curious to explore available resources. Prefers hands-on learning and organized note-taking.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about film projectors and vintage cinema but is unfamiliar with digital workspace tools. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has found relevant files, read their contents, and created a new file with organized notes about film projector maintenance.
